meta.title: ATA Chapter — Download
meta.description: Fast ATA chapter lookup on your phone. Early access APK; stores coming soon.

home.releaseTipBody: New version is live. Get the latest APK on the Download & releases page.
home.playStoreNoticeBody: APK downloads have been permanently disabled. The app will be released on Google Play soon.
home.alphaTestBody: The app is currently in alpha on Google Play and we need 20 testers for the next stage. See full details on the Join Test Team page.
home.alphaReq1: You need a device running Android 7.0 or later.
home.alphaReq2: You should be able to send feedback when you encounter bugs or issues during testing.

hero.headline: ATA Chapter In Your Pocket
hero.title: ATA Chapter In Your Pocket
hero.subtitle: Landing-style clarity; UI matches the in-app dark experience.
hero.lead: Helps you look up the aviation ATA chapter structure on your phone quickly and accurately. Instead of long searches through heavy manuals, chapter numbers and titles stay ready in your pocket.

showcase.p: Search bar, chapter cards, and expandable sections—in a readable dark UI.
showcase.alt1: ATA Reference: chapter list and search
showcase.alt2: ATA Reference: expanded section and sub-headings

quote.text: A pocket reference when you need the right chapter on the ramp or at a desk.

store.copy: Google Play and App Store builds are coming soon. APK distribution has been permanently disabled.
store.asAlt: Coming soon on the App Store

launch.title: Coming soon
launch.body:
ATA Chapter on the Google Play Store — coming soon.

I sincerely thank everyone who has supported the project to reach this point. The trust, testing and feedback from day one are reflected in this app.

If you would like to provide financial support, you can reach Yusuf Mirza Sökmen directly through the contact page.

nedir.p: ATA (Air Transport Association) chapters are the standard numbering for aircraft systems and documentation. This app makes it easier to open your phone and reach the right chapter information for maintenance, planning, or technical work.

chapters.lead: Pick a chapter to expand subchapters.

features.lead: Whether on the ramp or at a desk, focus on chapter logic in one glance.
features.f1p: Jump to the chapter layout on your phone without flipping through long PDFs.
features.f2p: Aligned with standard ATA numbering to support your workflow.
features.f3p: Install the Android APK—no browser tab juggling.

download.lead: Latest package, release notes, and older builds are on the download page. Your feedback matters during early access.
download.cta: Android APK from this official site.

credits.testNames: Mustafa Değirmencioğlu · Murat Yılmaz · Sena Yılmaz · Ali Kavas

appsync.p1: The language and theme you pick on this site are stored in the browser. The Android app can read them using one of the methods below.
appsync.p2: localStorage: ata-lang (tr | en), ata-theme (light | dark). Cookies: ata_site_lang, ata_site_theme. On each page load, window.__ATA_APP_PREFS__ and the ata-app-sync event are updated.
appsync.deeplink: Deep link (if the app registers the intent):
appsync.contract: Machine-readable contract: app-sync-contract.json — update the scheme and package name for your build.

feedback.p: Leave feedback below for missing chapters, bugs, or ideas. Comments are public for everyone to read.
feedback.empty: No feedback yet. Be the first to write!
feedback.errMsgShort: Message must be at least 3 characters.
feedback.errProfanity: Your message or name contains disallowed language.
feedback.adminHotkeyHint: Open this dialog with Alt+Shift+Y. Reply fields stay hidden for everyone else.
feedback.adminSignedOk: Signed in. Reply fields and admin delete appear only for you.
feedback.adminDelErr: Could not delete. Check sign-in and database rules.
feedback.teamProfileHint: The name and rank you save are copied into each site reply when you publish it and stay there permanently (even after sign-out). Save your profile first.
feedback.teamProfileErr: Could not save profile. Check Firebase rules and sign-in.
feedback.replyErr: Could not save reply. Check UID and database rules.

wix.featuresLead: Highlight what matters — the same clear card layout as the Wix app landing template.
wix.valuesLead: What sets us apart, in short.
wix.v1p: No clutter — jump straight to ATA chapter logic.
wix.v2p: Aligned with standard numbering for consistent reference.
wix.v3p: Install via APK; practical for on-the-go use.
wix.v4p: Feedback and Issues keep development visible.
wix.testimonialsLead: Short quotes from early access — same section rhythm as the template.
wix.t1: Exactly what I need on the line to check numbers.
wix.t2: I verify chapter titles without digging through PDFs.
wix.contactLead: Use the form for questions; use the GitHub section below for technical feedback.
wix.formNote: This form mirrors the Wix template layout; submit scrolls to the GitHub comments area.
wix.communityLead: Missing chapters, bugs, or ideas — public comments (GitHub sign-in).
wix.bannerP: Get the latest Android APK from this site; store builds coming soon.
wix.footerTag: ATA chapter reference — early access. Store builds coming soon.

install.s1a: Android phone or tablet (preferably a recent OS version).
install.s1b: Enough free storage (a bit more than the APK size).
install.s1c: You downloaded the APK from our download page.
install.s2p: By default Android only allows installs from stores. If you install via browser or Files, allow that app once.
install.s2l2: Go to Apps or Notifications & apps.
install.s2l3: Pick the app that opens the APK (often Chrome, Downloads, or Files).
install.s2l4: Enable Install unknown apps / Allow from this source.
install.s2note: Some devices also prompt during the first install; you can allow there too.
install.s3l1: Download the latest .apk from the download page.
install.s3l2: Tap the file from the notification shade or find it under Files / Downloads.
install.s3l3: Tap the file to open the package installer.
install.s4l3: When done, tap Open or use the home screen icon.
install.s5p: Play Protect may warn on non-Play APKs. If you got the file from this official page, risk is lower—still only install from sources you trust.
install.s5note: If you see “Install anyway”, only continue if you trust the download source.
install.s6p: When a new build ships, download the latest APK from the download page and install over the old one. Data is usually kept; back up anything critical.
